(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))
  (setq csv-file (strcat (vl-filename-directory (getenv “TEMP”)) “\data.csv”)) ; Fix the path separator

  (if (tblobjname “LAYER” layer)
    (progn
      (setq data '(“Object Type” “Area” “Length”)) ; Header of the CSV file

      (defun add-to-data (ent)
        (if (eq “AcDbHatch” (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
          (progn
            (setq hatch (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))
            (setq area (vla-get-Area hatch))
            (setq data (append data (list “HATCH” area)))
          ))
        (if (or (eq “AcDbLine” (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
                (eq “AcDbPolyline” (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
          (progn
            (setq length (vla-get-trueLength (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
            (setq data (append data (list (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))) length)))
          ))

      (setq acadApp (vlax-get-acad-object))
      (setq doc (vla-get-activedocument acadApp))
      (setq ms (vla-get-ModelSpace doc))

      (setq csv-str “”) ; Initialize CSV string

      (vlax-for ent ms ; Iterate over entities in ModelSpace
        (setq current-layer (vlax-get ent 'layer))
        (if (and (= (vla-get-objectname current-layer) “AcDbLayerTableRecord”)
                 (equal (vlax-get current-layer 'name) layer))
          (add-to-data ent)
          )
        )

      (foreach item data
        (setq csv-str (strcat csv-str (vl-string-quote (strcase (car item))) “,” (vl-princ-to-string (cadr item)) “,”))
        )

      (setq csv-file (open csv-file “w”))
      (write-line csv-str csv-file)
      (close csv-file)

      (princ “\nData gathering complete. CSV file saved on the desktop.”)
    )
    (princ “\nSpecified layer does not exist.”)
  )
)

(defun c:test-gather-data ()
  (c:gather-data)
  (princ)
)

(c:test-gather-data)

This code defines a common lisp function `c:gather-data` that prompts the user to enter a layer name and then gathers data from entities on that layer in AutoCAD. The data includes the object type, area, and length for each entity. The gathered data is then saved in a CSV file on the desktop.

To test the function, you can call `(c:test-gather-data)`.
im getting a error in line 32. this is being used in civil 3d 2022.

The error in line 32 is likely due to the use of a wrong syntax for opening the file in write mode. In Civil 3D 2022, you can modify the code on line 32 to use the `vl-file-syst-write` function instead of `open`.

Replace this line:
```lisp
(setq csv-file (open csv-file “w”))
```

With this line:
```lisp
(setq csv-file (vl-file-syst-write csv-file))
```

This change should resolve the error and allow the code to work properly in Civil 3D 2022.

```

(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))
  (setq csv-file (strcat (vl-filename-directory (getenv "TEMP")) "\\data.csv")) ; Fix the path separator

  (if (tblobjname "LAYER" layer)
    (progn
      (setq data '("Object Type" "Area" "Length")) ; Header of the CSV file

      (defun add-to-data (ent)
        (if (eq "AcDbHatch" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
          (progn
            (setq hatch (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))
            (setq area (vla-get-Area hatch))
            (setq data (append data (list "HATCH" area)))
          ))
        (if (or (eq "AcDbLine" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
                (eq "AcDbPolyline" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
          (progn
            (setq length (vla-get-TrueLength (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
            (setq data (append data (list (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))) length)))
          ))

      (setq acadApp (vlax-get-acad-object))
      (setq doc (vla-get-activedocument acadApp))
      (setq ms (vla-get-ModelSpace doc))

      (setq csv-str "") ; Initialize CSV string

      (vlax-for ent ms ; Iterate over entities in ModelSpace
        (setq current-layer (vlax-get ent 'layer))
        (if (and (= (vla-get-objectname current-layer) "AcDbLayerTableRecord")
                 (equal (vla-get current-layer 'name) layer))
          (add-to-data ent)
          )
        )

      (foreach item data
        (setq csv-str (strcat csv-str (vl-string-quote (strcase (car item))) "," (vl-princ-to-string (cadr item)) ","))
        )

      (setq csv-file (vl-file-syst-write csv-file csv-str))

      (princ "\nData gathering complete. CSV file saved on the desktop.")
    )
    (princ "\nSpecified layer does not exist.")
  )
)

(defun c:test-gather-data ()
  (c:gather-data)
  (princ)
)

(c:test-gather-data)

I apologize for the confusion. It seems that the error is related to the `vlax-for` loop where we iterate over the entities in the ModelSpace. Specifically, the issue arises when we try to access the `layer` property of an entity.

To resolve the error, we can use the `vla-get-Layer` method instead of `vlax-get` to obtain the layer property of an entity. Here's the updated code with the correction:

```lisp
(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))
  (setq csv-file (strcat (vl-filename-directory (getenv "TEMP")) "\\data.csv"))

  (if (tblobjname "LAYER" layer)
    (progn
      (setq data '("Object Type" "Area" "Length")) ; Header of the CSV file

      (defun add-to-data (ent)
        (if (eq "AcDbHatch" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
          (progn
            (setq hatch (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))
            (setq area (vla-get-Area hatch))
            (setq data (append data (list "HATCH" area)))
          ))
        (if (or (eq "AcDbLine" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
                (eq "AcDbPolyline" (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))))
          (progn
            (setq length (vla-get-TrueLength (vlax-ename->vla-object ent)))
            (setq data (append data (list (vla-get-objectname (vlax-ename->vla-object ent))) length)))
          ))

      (setq acadApp (vlax-get-acad-object))
      (setq doc (vla-get-activedocument acadApp))
      (setq ms (vla-get-ModelSpace doc))

      (setq csv-str "") ; Initialize CSV string

      (vlax-for ent ms ; Iterate over entities in ModelSpace
        (setq current-layer (vla-get-Layer ent))
        (if (and (= (vlax-get-entity ename 'objectname) "AcDbLayerTableRecord")
                 (equal (vla-get current-layer 'name) layer))
          (add-to-data ent)
          )
        )

      (foreach item data
        (setq csv-str (strcat csv-str (vl-string-quote (strcase (car item))) "," (vl-princ-to-string (cadr item)) ","))
        )

      (setq csv-file (vl-file-syst-write csv-file csv-str))

      (princ "\nData gathering complete. CSV file saved on the desktop.")
    )
    (princ "\nSpecified layer does not exist.")
  )
)

(defun c:test-gather-data ()
  (c:gather-data)
  (princ)
)

(c:test-gather-data)
```

(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))
  (setq csv-file (strcat (vl-filename-directory (getenv "TEMP")) "\\data.csv"))

  (if (tblobjname "LAYER" layer)
    (progn
      (setq data '("Object Type" "Area" "Length")) ; Header of the CSV file

      (defun add-to-data (ent)
        (if (eq "AcDbHatch" (vla-get-objectname ent))
          (progn
            (setq area (vla-get-Area ent))
            (setq data (append data (list "HATCH" area)))
          ))
        (if (or (eq "AcDbLine" (vla-get-objectname ent))
                (eq "AcDbPolyline" (vla-get-objectname ent)))
          (progn
            (setq length (vla-get-TrueLength ent))
            (setq data (append data (list (vla-get-objectname ent) length)))
          ))
        )

      (setq acadApp (vlax-get-acad-object))
      (setq doc (vla-get-activatedocument acadApp))
      (setq ms (vla-get-modelspace doc))

      (setq csv-str "") ; Initialize CSV string

      (vlax-for ent ms ; Iterate over entities in ModelSpace
        (setq current-layer (vla-get-layer ent))
        (if (and (= (vla-get-objectname current-layer) "AcDbLayerTableRecord")
                 (equal (vla-get current-layer 'name) layer))
          (add-to-data ent)
        )
      )

      (foreach item data
        (setq csv-str (strcat csv-str (vl-string-quote (strcase (car item))) "," (vl-princ-to-string (cadr item)) ","))
        )

      (setq csv-file (vl-file-syst-write csv-file csv-str))

      (princ "\nData gathering complete. CSV file saved on the desktop.")
    )

)

)

I apologize for the confusion. It seems that there is a typo in the code. The correct function name to activate a document is `vla-activate`, not `vla-activatedocument`. Please make the following adjustment:

```lisp
(setq doc (vla-activate acadApp (vla-get-ActiveDocument acadApp)))
```

Replace the above line with the following line:

```lisp
(setq doc (vla-activate acadApp (vla-get-ActiveDocument acadApp)))
```

I apologize for the confusion. It appears that the `Activate` method is not available in the AutoCAD object model. In that case, we can modify the code to use the `Documents` collection to access the Active Document. Here's the updated code:

```lisp
(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))
  (setq csv-file (strcat (vl-filename-directory (getenv "TEMP")) "\\data.csv"))

  (if (tblobjname "LAYER" layer)
    (progn
      (setq data '("Object Type" "Area" "Length")) ; Header of the CSV file

      (defun add-to-data (ent)
        (if (eq "AcDbHatch" (vla-get-objectname ent))
          (progn
            (setq area (vla-get-Area ent))
            (setq data (append data (list "HATCH" area)))
          ))
        (if (or (eq "AcDbLine" (vla-get-objectname ent))
                (eq "AcDbPolyline" (vla-get-objectname ent)))
          (progn
            (setq length (vla-get-TrueLength ent))
            (setq data (append data (list (vla-get-objectname ent) length)))
          ))
        )

      (setq acadApp (vlax-get-acad-object))
      (setq doc (vla-item (vla-get-Documents acadApp) 0))
      (setq ms (vla-get-modelspace doc))

      (setq csv-str "") ; Initialize CSV string

      (vlax-for ent ms ; Iterate over entities in ModelSpace
        (setq current-layer (vla-get-layer ent))
        (if (and (= (vla-get-objectname current-layer) "AcDbLayerTableRecord")
                 (equal (vla-get current-layer 'name) layer))
          (add-to-data ent)
        )
      )

      (foreach item data
        (setq csv-str (strcat csv-str (vl-string-quote (strcase (car item))) "," (vl-princ-to-string (cadr item)) ","))
        )

      (setq csv-file (vl-file-syst-write csv-file csv-str))

      (princ "\nData gathering complete. CSV file saved on the desktop.")
    )
    (princ "\nSpecified layer does not exist.")
  )
)

(defun c:test-gather-data ()
  (c:gather-data)
  (princ)
)

(c:test-gather-data)
```

To fix this issue, we will modify the code to get the layer name from the `current-layer` object and then compare it with the desired layer name. Here's the updated code:

```lisp
(defun c:gather-data ()
  (setq layer (getstring "\nEnter layer name: "))

  (if (tblobjname "LAYER" layer)
